arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Borussia Dortmund, Napoli 'serious contenders' for Red Devils attacker after fresh development
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund and Napoli are allegedly both firmly in the race to sign Manchester United attacker Marcus Rashford before the end of the month.

arts.sum: Federico Chiesa has the chance to return to Italy with interest from Napoli but a big decision is now facing him after scoring his first...

arts.ttl: Napoli will go against Verona to keep the lead
arts.sum: After the 3-0 success on MD1 in Serie A this term, Hellas Verona could beat Napoli in both seasonal matches of a single top-flight championship for the first time in their history. The Campania team could also keep a clean sheet in 12 of their first 20 matches in a single top-flight season for the first time since 1981/82.

arts.ttl: PSG Set to Sign Napoli Megastar on Favorable Terms
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could reportedly complete a long-awaited deal for wantaway Napoli forward Khvicha Kvaratskhelia on favorable terms. According to L'Equipe, the Georgian's impending arrival won't set the club back €80 million as initially expected. The post PSG Set to Sign Napoli Megastar on Favorable Terms appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds contact agent as Kvicha Kvaratskhelia makes transfer request
arts.sum: Liverpool have made contact over a possible successor for Andrew Robertson while Khvicha Kvaratskhelia wants to complete a transfer away from Napoli in January with the Reds interested

arts.ttl: PSG could complete deal to sign for Khvicha Kvaratskhelia for as little as €65m
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe, Paris Saint-Germain could be set to complete a deal to sign Napoli forward Khvicha Kvaratskhelia (23) for a fee between €65m and €70m. A much lower fee…

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Romain Esse to Crystal Palace, Woyo Coulibaly to Leicester, Philip Billing to Napoli
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Romain Esse to Crystal Palace, Woyo Coulibaly to Leicester City and Philip Billing to Napoli.

arts.ttl: Napoli set to target Rashford move - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Napoli set to try to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford, PSG close to deal for Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, Barcelona interested in Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak, plus more.

arts.ttl: 'Disappointed' Conte confirms star winger Kvaratskhelia has asked to leave Napoli
arts.sum: Napoli coach Antonio Conte confirmed on Saturday that Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has asked to leave the club in the January transfer window, amid reports the 23-year-old’s entourage is already in talks with Paris Saint-Germain. Title-chasing Napoli looks set to lose another one of its key players who helped it win its last Serie A crown.
